title: Gradient Computation: Parameter-Shift Rules and Beyond
description: Master quantum gradient computation techniques including the parameter-shift rule, stochastic gradient estimation, and hardware-efficient methods. Learn to compute exact gradients on quantum hardware for variational optimization.
learningObjectives: Derive and apply the parameter-shift rule for quantum gradients
Implement gradient computation for different gate types
Compare exact gradients with finite difference approximations
Apply stochastic gradient estimation for shot-efficient training
Implement simultaneous measurement strategies for gradient estimation
Analyze the cost-accuracy tradeoffs in quantum gradient methods
